parts.answer: Uses T = 2 ට ௟ ௚ with l = H – h Clear algebra leading to formula Example of derivation T = 2 ට ௟ ௚ where l = H – h So T = 2 ට ுି௛ ௚ ∴푇 ଶ =4π ଶ ൬ 퐻−ℎ 푔 ൰ = 4π ଶ 퐻−4π ଶ ℎ 푔 = 4π ଶ 퐻 푔 − 4π ଶ ℎ 푔 (1) (1) 2. Calculation of a relevant limit using percentage uncertainty shown Or Calculation of a relevant uncertainty using percentage uncertainty shown Upper limit  for rubber band = 1.20 (g cm −3 ) and Lower limit  for rubber bung = 1.50 (g cm −3 ) They are not made from the same type of rubber as the upper limit of the rubber band does not overlap the lower limit for the rubber bung MP3 dependent MP2 Example of calculation Upper limit  for rubber band = 1.15 × (1 + ସ.ଷ ଵ଴଴ ) = 1.20 (g cm −3 ) Lower limit  for rubber bung = 1.52 × (1 − ଵ.ଶ ଵ଴଴ ) = 1.50 (g cm −3 ) (1) (1) (1) Total for question 4 16 Pearson Education Limited.
